concept.title: DITA-OT Architecture and DevOps
concept.shortdesc: This handbook is for engineers who want to develop DITA Open Toolkit—either by contributing to the core toolkit or by building production-grade transformations and pipelines with plug-ins, containers, and CI/CD.

conbody.p: This handbook covers the full DITA-OT development stack, from internal architecture through production deployment. It is based on the official DITA-OT development documentation and references.

ul.li: Architecture and Preprocessing — the multi-stage pipeline, temp directory, preprocessing deep dive, and map-first preprocess2
Customization and Plug-Ins — extension points, XSLT-import overrides, robust patterns, pipeline hooks, and a complete plug-in template
DevOps and Operations — building from source, Docker workflows, GitHub Actions CI/CD, debugging, and repository layout

conbody.note: Each topic in this chapter can be read independently. Start with the architecture topics if you are new to DITA-OT internals, or jump to the DevOps section for CI/CD recipes.
